name: Implementing Product and Revenue Tracking
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost supports various ways of tracking product and revenue information, including REST APIs, integration with e-commerce platforms, and Maropost's Web Tracking feature. You can evaluate your needs and implement the feature that suits you the best."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn why product and revenue tracking is important to you and where you can find the information in Marketing Cloud, see\u00a0"}, {"text": "Introduction to Product and Revenue Tracking", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "PRODUCT/REVENUE REST APIs"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The REST APIs provide a flexible way to engage with the product and revenue information. The GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE methods are available for managing both orders and products. To get more information on each of these API methods, see the API Reference (REST APIs > PRODUCT/REVENUE)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The POST/orders method in Product/Revenue REST APIs enables you to capture the order details (such as the email address of the purchaser and the order items) in Maropost\u2019s product and revenue database."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": This field is useful when you want to segment your customers by category of products purchased."}]}]}], "actualHeight": 184.75}], "id": "table-0-9", "colSizes": [148, 110, 166, 190], "contentAlignment": {"columns": {"0": {"alignment": "center", "appliedTimestamp": 1752748282257}, "1": {"alignment": "center", "appliedTimestamp": 1752748287657}, "2": {"alignment": "center", "appliedTimestamp": 1752748290718}, "3": {"alignment": "center", "appliedTimestamp": 1752748293677}}}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Input Payload Example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following is a sample of the input payload for the method in JSON format:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{ \"order\": { \"contact\": { \"email\": \"test@yahoo.com\", \"first_name\": \"test\", \"last_name\": \"test1\" }, \"custom_field\": { \"country\": \"test\", \"gender\": \"male\" }, \"add_tags\": [ \"tag_name\", \"tag_name\" ], \"remove_tags\": [ \"tag_name\", \"tag_name\" ], \"uid\": \"abcd\", \"list_ids\": \"12,13\", \"order_date\": \"2017-10-13T18:05:24-04:00\", \"order_status\": \"Processed\", \"original_order_id\": \"21\", \"grand_total\": \"966.00\", \"campaign_id\": null, \"coupon_code\": null, \"order_items\": [ { \"item_id\": \"7\", \"price\": \"133.00\", \"quantity\": \"3\", \"description\": \"Ebook\", \"adcode\": \"Xyrsty\", \"category\": \"xyz\" }, { \"item_id\": \"9\", \"price\": \"833.00\", \"quantity\": \"1\", \"description\": \"iphone\", \"adcode\": \"xYrstuv\", \"category\": \"abc\" } ] } }"}]}], "lang": "xml"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n"}, {"text": "Limitation", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to track campaign conversions, you must have the ability to capture and store the campaign ID that you must pass with the POST method."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Native Integration with E-Commerce Platforms"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost supports easy integrations with various e-commerce platforms that make it easier to pass the product and revenue information automatically to Maropost. The information is then updated in Maropost\u2019s revenue database synchronously."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We currently support native integration with the following: Shopify, 1Shopping cart, UltraCart, Nanacast cart, 3dcart, and ClickBank. To learn about Shopify integration, see "}, {"text": "Integration with Shopify", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To learn about integration with the different shopping carts, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/736-integration-with-shopping-carts?utm_source=community-search&utm_medium=organic-search&utm_term=Integration+with+Carts", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Integration with Shopping Carts", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Limitation", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You cannot use the integration to track campaign conversions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Maropost\u2019s Web Tracking"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use Maropost\u2019s Web Tracking feature to set up a tracking script for capturing order details. As part of the setup, you create a JavaScript function that you invoke at the time of purchase completion and pass the variables from the user session into the product and revenue database."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "And because the Web Tracking feature also captures the campaign ID along with the purchase history, you can use this information to track campaign conversions and determine how well your campaigns are doing in terms of generating revenue."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, you send a campaign to your contact, and they click the link in the campaign to visit your website and then make a purchase. In this scenario, you can use the web tracking script to capture the purchase details into the Product and Revenue database along with the campaign ID, and therefore trace the purchase to the specific campaign."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enabling Web Tracking", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To enable web tracking to track product and revenue information, you are required to do the following setup tasks:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "First, enable Maropost\u2019s Web Tracking feature, which tracks the recency and frequency of page views by your known contacts. For more help, see "}, {"text": "Basic Web Tracking", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Then, enable the feature for capturing orders in the Orders tab of the Web Tracking Script Builder. For more help, see "}, {"text": "Capturing Web Conversions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Limitation", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The information may not be very accurate, as its tracking is cookie-based."}]}]
